headline: Amazon To Rally Around 49%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Top analysts change outlook for top names. Citigroup, Tigress Fin, Piper Sandler, Morgan Stanley, HC Wainwright, Susquehanna, Raymond James and Goldman Sachs adjust price targets for companies like Braze, Amazon, TELA Bio, Smithfield Foods, Corcept Therapeutics, TechnipFMC, Phillips 66, and KB Home. See all changes at benzinga.com/analyst-stock-ratings.

headline: Deutsche Bank Maintains Hold on Waters, Lowers Price Target to $330
summary: Deutsche Bank  analyst Justin Bowers   maintains Waters (NYSE:WAT) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $370 to $330.
